parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'activity_log', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.created_at DESC) FROM (
    SELECT created_at, agent_name, action, status, LEFT(output_summary, 100) AS preview
      FROM activity_log
     WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
     ORDER BY created_at DESC
     LIMIT 50
  ) t),
  'security_events', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.occurred_at DESC) FROM (
    SELECT occurred_at, event_type, severity, source_ip, LEFT(description, 100) AS preview, resolved
      FROM security_events
     WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
     ORDER BY occurred_at DESC
     LIMIT 30
  ) t),
  'workflow_errors_24h', (SELECT count(*) FROM activity_log WHERE action='workflow_error' AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
) AS report;
